reason: TCP stream reassembly was built and validated against solved C2S KXSEQ frames. Stream-level S2C crib-dragging tested relevant continuous S2C stream intervals, including cross-segment offsets; KXSEQ still produced zero candidates. MOTD produced slot-consistency candidates but no validated S2C plaintext or keyroll. Deframe hypotheses around known small S2C frames did not produce a reliable length-boundary hypothesis. Existing capture remains insufficient; capture kit is ready for a stronger S2C oracle.
next_action: Use tools/pass637_capture_kit to capture s2c_oracle_world_entry.pcapng with exact S2C_ORACLE markers and log visible times, then rerun the stream oracle against that new capture.
